case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF S. F. vs. BROUSSARD, CELESTINE et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC BODY, CORPORATE AND POLITIC COURT TRIAL SET FOR JAN-10-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 03 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE KOSSOW ARTHUR WONG, FOR PLTF. DEFTS. NOT PRESENT. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFTS. WITNESS SWORN & EXAMINED. EXH INTRODUCED & ADMITTED IN EVID. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. AGAINST DEFTS, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROUSSARD, CELESTINE HACKETT, ELAINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 65 NICHOLS WAY, SF, CA $1,811.70 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,811.70, LEASE FORFEITED, COST AS PER COST BILL.
